rows.description: Computus Thomas Bray Rectoris a 2do die Novembris 1702 ad eundem diem revolutum 1703.
rows.notes: The original image clearly shows this as a single continuous header line. GPT-5-mini correctly identified it as a single line, but 'Thomas' was misread as 'Thomas' (corrected to 'Thomas'), '2do' was read as '2do' (kept), and 'revolutum' was misread as 'revolution' (corrected). Gemini-flash incorrectly split this into two separate rows. This entry consolidates and corrects based on direct visual verification.
rows.section_header: Computus Thomas Bray Rectoris a 2do die Novembris 1702 ad eundem diem revolutum 1703.

rows.notes: Full consensus between both extractors for description, type, and empty monetary amounts. Visual verification confirms accuracy.

Amounts (62 10 0) are in consensus. Gemini-flash's description is visually accurate ('Southwingston', 'Dimid:', 'Ann:'), while gpt-5-mini had multiple misreadings ('Southwickton', 'dimd:', 'Arre') despite its note acknowledging uncertainty. Selected gemini-flash for description accuracy.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly rent from the Southwingston rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly rent from the Southwingston rectory, amounting to £62 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts (24 16 6) are in consensus. Gemini-flash's description is visually accurate ('Sidlingston', 'Brix', 'bien:'), while gpt-5-mini's ('Ridlington Mills pro tithes') is significantly incorrect despite its high confidence. Selected gemini-flash.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from Sidlingston Brix, amounting to £24 16s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts (6 9 4) are in consensus. Gemini-flash's description is visually accurate ('Gorsington', 'Dn:', 'Ladler', 'Ann:'). Gpt-5-mini had multiple misreadings ('Garsington B. Sadler pro Arre') and its notes reflected moderate uncertainty. Selected gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Gorsington paid by Mr Ladler.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Gorsington paid by Mr Ladler, amounting to £6 9s 4d.

rows.english_description: Annual rent from Gorsington paid by J. Prickett.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Gorsington paid by J. Prickett, amounting to £6 9s 4d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Clifton Ferry paid by Mr Wells, amounting to £5 17s 2d.

rows.notes: Amounts disagreed (gemini-flash: 1 18 6; gpt-5-mini: 1 10 6). Visual verification clearly shows '18' shillings. Description also disagreed (gemini-flash: 'Southwingston Sen: pro Ann:', gpt-5-mini: 'Southwickton Gen: pro Arre:'). Gemini-flash's description is accurate. Gpt-5-mini's note acknowledges faintness for shillings but misread it, and also had multiple description errors. Selected gemini-flash after visual override for both.
rows.english_description: Annual payment relating to Southwingston (senior tenancy).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment relating to Southwingston senior tenancy, amounting to £1 18s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts (4 14 8 0.75) are in consensus. Gemini-flash's description is visually accurate ('Tinkinhul Hepson pro Ann:'). Gpt-5-mini's description ('Tichfield Napier pro Arre') is significantly incorrect and its notes express more uncertainty about the fraction's clarity. Gemini-flash's note states the fraction is 'slightly faint but unambiguous', which aligns with visual inspection. Selected gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Tinkinhul paid by Hepson.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Tinkinhul paid by Hepson, amounting to £4 14s 8 3/4d.

rows.description: Sir Greg: Page Terrar pro bien:
rows.notes: Amounts (16 7 10 0.5) are in consensus. Gemini-flash's description is visually accurate ('Terrar', 'bien:'). Gpt-5-mini misread 'Terrar' as 'Tenor' and 'bien:' as 'Arre:', and its notes express more uncertainty about the fraction's clarity than gemini-flash. Selected gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Biennial payment from Sir Gregory Page (land/terrarium matters).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial payment from Sir Gregory Page, amounting to £16 7s 10 1/2d.

rows.description: W M - Stills pene - Henly pro Ann:
rows.notes: Amounts disagreed (gemini-flash: 1 1 0; gpt-5-mini: 1 10 0). Visual verification clearly shows '1' shilling. Description also disagreed significantly. Gemini-flash's description is accurate, including dashes and specific words. Gpt-5-mini had major description errors and misread '1' shilling as '10'. Selected gemini-flash after visual override for both.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from W. M. Stills relating to Henley.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from W. M. Stills for Henley, amounting to £1 1s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts (208 3 1 0.5) are in consensus. The description differed (gemini-flash: '', gpt-5-mini: 'Total'). Visual inspection shows no text 'Total' on the line, only the horizontal line and amounts. Gemini-flash correctly provided an empty description. Gemini-flash's note also more accurately reflects the clarity of the numbers than gpt-5-mini's. Selected gemini-flash for description and clarity of reading.
